issues.title: Confirm EU-only storage region
issues.description: Acme requires EU customer data to remain in EU data centers. Confirm EU-only storage before go-live.

issues.title: Update SOW with data residency clause
issues.description: The statement of work currently defaults storage to US and omits the EU residency guarantee.

issues.title: Assign Product/Security/Engineering owners
issues.description: EU data residency readiness needs named owners across Product, Security, and Engineering.
